prompt_template: Provide a narrative description including objects, colors and detail. Avoid interpretation, just describe.

prompt_variations.narrative: Describe this image in a narrative style. Start with the overall scene, then describe specific objects and people from left to right. Include colors, clothing details, and spatial relationships. Mention what's in the foreground, middle ground, and background. Use concrete, specific language without metaphor or interpretation.
prompt_variations.detailed:
Provide a structured description of this image:

SUBJECT: Identify the main subject(s) and what they're doing
SETTING: Describe the environment/location/background
COLORS: Note dominant colors, lighting conditions, and color contrasts
COMPOSITION: Mention perspective, depth, framing, and spatial relationships
DETAILS: Include notable textures, patterns, or distinctive features

Keep descriptions informative and organized. Avoid flowery language.
prompt_variations.concise: In 2-3 sentences, describe: what's in this image, where it is, and what's happening. Be brief but specific.
prompt_variations.artistic:
Describe this image with attention to its visual qualities:

• What draws the eye first and why
• How light and shadow interact
• Color relationships and their effect
• The overall visual mood or feeling
• What makes this image visually compelling

Use clear, accessible language. No art jargon unless it's genuinely helpful.
prompt_variations.technical:
Provide a concise technical evaluation of this image:
- Subject identification: What is shown and its apparent purpose
- Orientation and alignment: Whether the image is level, tilted, or crooked. Note if horizons are slanted or vertical lines are leaning
- Lighting characteristics: Quality, direction, natural/artificial source, contrast
- Composition approach: Framing, spatial organization, visual hierarchy
- Image clarity and detail: Sharpness, resolution, exposure quality
- Notable strengths or limitations: What works well or presents challenges (including if image needs straightening)
Skip camera equipment speculation entirely.
prompt_variations.colorful: Describe this image with visual accuracy. State what the image depicts, then detail the color palette using specific names (crimson, navy, ivory, slate, amber, charcoal, ochre, teal, coral, emerald). Mention lighting direction and quality. End with one sentence about the atmosphere. Keep it grounded and concrete. Avoid words like 'stunning', 'breathtaking', 'mesmerizing', or 'ethereal'.
prompt_variations.simple: Provide a simple, brief description of this image in one sentence.
prompt_variations.accessibility: Describe this image for a screen reader user. Start with the main subject and overall scene. Then describe objects and people from left to right, including their colors, sizes, and positions relative to each other. Mention foreground, middle ground, and background elements. Use concrete, specific language without metaphor or visual-only references.
prompt_variations.comparison: Describe this image by comparing elements to familiar everyday objects, experiences, or well-known references. Use analogies like 'shaped like a...', 'resembles...', 'similar to...', 'about the size of...' to help someone understand what they're seeing. Make space imagery and abstract concepts relatable.
prompt_variations.mood: Describe the emotional atmosphere and mood of this image. What feelings does it evoke? What is the psychological tone? Describe the emotional quality of the lighting, the mood conveyed by the composition, and the overall feeling or atmosphere in rich, evocative language.
prompt_variations.functional: Describe what is happening in this image by focusing on function, purpose, and action. What are the objects FOR? What are they DOING? What is their utility or role? Describe actions, processes, relationships of use, and functional meaning. Focus on verbs: illuminates, supports, connects, transforms, protects, enables.

chronological_sorting.description: Images are automatically sorted by file modification time (oldest first) before processing. This ensures descriptions appear in chronological order, which is especially useful for photo collections and video frames.
chronological_sorting.rationale: File modification times are preserved when copying photos from devices like iPhones, making them reliable for chronological ordering. Video frames inherit their source video's modification time.

available_models.description: Any Ollama vision model can be used. Install models with 'ollama pull MODEL_NAME'.

recommended.name: moondream:latest
recommended.description: Fastest, lightweight local model. Good for quick descriptions and batch processing. Default for out-of-the-box functionality.

recommended.name: kimi-k2.5:cloud
recommended.description: High quality, detailed descriptions. Best for narrative, detailed, artistic, and technical styles. Requires cloud provider setup.

recommended.name: gemma4:31b-cloud
recommended.description: Fast, good quality, excellent at following structured prompts. Best for colorful, concise, comparison. Requires cloud provider setup.

recommended.name: qwen3.5:cloud
recommended.description: Good quality, balanced speed and detail. Requires cloud provider setup.

available_models.documentation: See bat/ directory for ready-to-use model scripts, or visit https://ollama.com/library for full model list

api_keys.description: API keys for cloud AI providers. Managed via Tools → Configure Settings → API Keys tab.

documentation.overview: This configuration file controls all aspects of the image description process. Version 3.1 includes extensively researched prompt improvements.

prompt_styles.narrative: Flowing description with spatial organization (left-to-right, foreground/background)
prompt_styles.detailed: Structured sections: SUBJECT, SETTING, COLORS, COMPOSITION, DETAILS
prompt_styles.concise: Brief 2-3 sentence summary with what's in it, where it is, what's happening
prompt_styles.artistic: Visual qualities analysis with bullet points, accessible language
prompt_styles.technical: Practical technical evaluation - lighting, composition, quality, no camera speculation
prompt_styles.colorful: Visual accuracy with specific color names (crimson, navy, ivory, etc.)
prompt_styles.accessibility: Screen reader optimized - concrete language, spatial relationships, no visual-only refs
prompt_styles.comparison: Analogies to familiar objects - makes abstract images relatable
prompt_styles.functional: Focus on purpose, action, utility - what things DO

model_settings.temperature: Controls randomness (0.0-1.0). Lower = more consistent. Recommended: 0.1-0.35 depending on style.
model_settings.num_predict: Max tokens to generate. Detailed: 500, Concise: 200, Colorful: 350, Simple: 150
model_settings.top_k: Number of top tokens to consider. Concise uses 30 for tighter outputs, others use 40.
model_settings.top_p: Cumulative probability cutoff. Concise uses 0.85, others 0.9.

deprecated_styles: clock-face spatial - FAILED testing, produces bounding box coordinates instead of descriptions
